title: astragalus pendulinus
intro: Astragalus pendulinus, also known as Russian milk-vetch, is a perennial legume plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its adaptogenic and immune-boosting properties, which are attributed to its high content of saponins, flavonoids, and alkaloids. The medicinal properties of Astragalus pendulinus are believed to promote health by reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular function, and enhancing the body's natural response to stress and disease. Astragalus pendulinus is commonly prepared as a decoction, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to support overall health and well-being.
